task: Perform a sensitivity analysis around the governing adjudication threshold using only the embedded packet. Identify records with unstable classifications and produce a recommended remediation prioritization under a fixed budget. Deliver a spreadsheet (endpoint_adjudication_3.xlsx) containing formulas, intermediate values, and row-level citations, and an expert memo (expert_memo.md) documenting explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent or impute inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
